bhajans.bhajan_title: Dhimita Dhimita Dhim Dhim Nache Bholanath
Parti Purisna Prashanti Vaasa Sai Murari
Durga Vabhavari Ma Jaya Jaya Sai Ma
Bhajo Sita Ram Bhajo Radhey Shyam
Ayodhya Vaasi Ram Hai Dwaraka Me Aayi
Parti Purisna Prashanti Vasa Sai Murari
Hum Tere Sai Hum Tere Hain
Parti Purisna Prashanti Vaasa Sai Murari
Om Hari Om Sai Shankara Om
Dhimita Dhimita Dhim Dhim Nache Bholanath
Anand Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai
Jau Na Jau Aba Hari Dar Bhetarana
Jhulana Mey Jhule Merey Sai Nandalala
Parti Purisna Prashanti Vasa Sai Murari
Anand Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai
Bala Gopal Jai Jai Sai Shyam
Anand Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai
Prerna Ki Jyoti Jalaye Sai Premeki Jyoti
Jhulana Mey Jhule Merey Sai Nandalala
Jai Durga Lakshmi Saraswathi Sai Jaganmata
